title: Customise Quarters on Timeline View
excerpt:
Hello, 
I need to create a Monday.com timeline view that has customised Quarters to match our Financial year. Is it possible to do with APIs? Any Monday.com developer that could help us adjust existing timeline view or b…

posts.author: ggozalova (Nay Gozalova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I need to create a Monday.com timeline view that has customised Quarters to match our Financial year. Is it possible to do with APIs? Any Monday.com developer that could help us adjust existing timeline view or build a new one?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ggozalova

We can help you here at upstream as we have our own full stack custom dev team, to compliment our award winning Platinum Partnership with monday.com

We were recently presented with another Professional Services Partner of the Year award and have a few of our own integration apps available on the monday.com App Marketplace.

I’d love to have a chat with you and discuss your requirements in better detail - please use the below link to schedule a time that suits, or feel free to reach me directly via peta@upstreamtech.io

meet with upstream

Thanks and kind regards,
Peta - Services Consultant at upstream

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nay Gozalova:

I need to create a Monday.com timeline view that has customised Quarters to match our Financial year. Is it possible to do with APIs?

Hey @ggozalova
You can’t customize the Timeline view thru the API.
You can however extract data using API and create your own view in monday.com platform or just outside of it.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @ggozalova and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

I’d be happy to take a look at your use case and see if the team at CarbonWeb might be able to help. As a Channel Partner with monday.com, we work with users every single day to solve their biggest problems.

Depending on what sort of data you are looking to have influence this timeline, there is certainly a lot that can be done with advanced API and also natively.

I would like to explore this project a bit more through a consultation if that is something you would like to schedule. You can grab time with me here: [Calendly](https://Consultation - Ricky )

Good luck as you set up this dynamic solution!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
